title: BOOX just added the one accessory Kindle users keep begging for
summary: Another Bluetooth remote joins the e-ink space, but it's still not for Kindle users.
body: TL;DR BOOX has launched Tappy, a Bluetooth remote for turning pages and more. The accessory works across reading, browsing, and listening modes on both BOOX tablets and smartphones. Tappy is available now for $25.99 on Amazon or directly through BOOX. BOOX launched a new accessory for streamlining interactions without touching your device. Called Tappy, the small Bluetooth remote lets users turn pages, scroll through articles, and control audiobook playback without touching their screen. In other words, another e-ink competitor just embraced the long-requested accessory Amazon still hasn’t added to the Kindle experience.

title: Google Tasks rolling out Material 3 Expressive widget
summary: The Workspace team is finally getting around to updating the Google Tasks widget on Android with Material 3 Expressive. more…
